This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] [required] reduceLogSumExp avoids overflows caused by taking the exp of large inputs
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test reduceLogSumExp float32 actual Infinity should be close enough to expected 100 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 20n but got 1018691584n
[FAIL] [required] reduceLogSumExp avoids underflows caused by taking the log of small inputs
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test reduceLogSumExp float32 actual -Infinity should be close enough to expected -100 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 20n but got 1018691584n
Harness: the test ran to completion.
